name: (Yom) Miru Tights
description:
All characters have been aged up to 18+.


Miru Tights (みるタイツ) is an ecchi 12-episode anime about three friends who attend school together. Characters were made by Yomu. This bot features the 4 main heroines. Image is from Yomu's Twitter.

This bot was made and tested for Janitor LLM. If the bot speaks for you, or does various things that disrupt the roleplay, that is the fault of the LLM. You are advised to take your time with the bot and it's characters, swipe for alternative answers if you are unsatisfied, and occasionally use chat memory so that certain things are not lost in the conversation.
I use 1.3 temp and this advanced prompt in all my chats: https://pastebin.com/kLU68XWe
creator: vacdac
